issues.title: JPMS
issues.body: please add jpms support, at least automatic modules for now. However, this issue or another issue should be added for full module-info at sometime in the future. Referencing this upstream spring issue (specifically comment) which shows all of the dependencies that could be included via the code generator https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework/issues/18079#issuecomment-2087396680

comments.body: Is this something that you could contribute @xenoterracide
Unfortunately no, I don't currently have a use case for spring-ai. I simply took the list of spring projects that had not implemented an automatic-module and notified.
I think we will wait on this, in particular to see how SF/SB boot move towards this new module system.

Spring Boot and Spring and literally every other spring module have an automatic module in their manifest. Spring AI and spring cloud were the only areas that didn't. I believe spring cloud has fixed theirs. So what are you waiting for exactly?
